question: Will the Narrows be hikeable on 2026/05/29?
reason: Recent data indicates Virgin River flow rates are below 150 CFS, suggesting The Narrows will be open.
evidence: USGS data shows Virgin River flow rates below 150 CFS in late May 2026.
Zion National Park reports The Narrows closure when flow exceeds 150 CFS.
Historical data indicates The Narrows typically closes in April due to snowmelt.
No significant rainfall or flash flood warnings reported for late May 2026.
searchQueries: Narrows hike 2026 May flooding conditions USGS USGS-09405500 water flow forecast
